mapper.sql: id, role_code, role_name, upper_level_role_code, next_level_role_code, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, remark
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM role_tbl WHERE role_code LIKE #{keyword} OR role_name LIKE #{keyword}
SELECT FROM role_tbl ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role_tbl (role_code, role_name, upper_level_role_code, next_level_role_code, description, status, create_by, update_by, remark) VALUES (#{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{upperLevelRoleCode}, #{nextLevelRoleCode}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE role_tbl SET role_code = #{roleCode}, role_name = #{roleName}, upper_level_role_code = #{upperLevelRoleCode}, next_level_role_code = #{nextLevelRoleCode}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM role_tbl WHERE role_code = #{roleCode}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM role_tbl WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND id != #{id}
